title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates how to build an "AI Layer" harness around Claude Code for large codebases, emphasizing that the system architecture (context, config, tooling) matters more than the model itself. The approach includes self-improving hooks, scoped skills, Language Server Protocol integration, Model Context Protocol, and subagents to enhance agent performance on code tasks.
